case_title: MIGUEL RAMIREZ VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-02-2020 - CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION TO AUG-18-2020 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY RAMIREZ, MIGUEL AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-23-2020 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RAMIREZ, MIGUEL IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
RETURN MAIL: SMALL CLAIMS CONTINUE ORDER SENT TO DEFENDANT,UNABLE TO FORWARD.
